seeds.title: 6B product price history effective dates
seeds.objective: Define the Phase 6B canonical pricing authority for product price histories with effective dates, preserving invoice immutability and separating 6B product/customer pricing from 6A platform pricing primitives.
seeds.scope_summary: Maintains product price histories with effective dates as the canonical 6B.02 pricing authority for product/customer price projection, invoice immutability handoff, and pricing evidence.
seeds.dependency_reason: V11 accepted pricing-anchor decision: product price histories/effective dates are the canonical 6B.02 pricing authority. Dependencies preserve product authority, 6A effective-date pricing primitive, optimization fact support, and manifest traceability.

dependency_edges.reason: 6B.02 source supports package suggestions and pricing projections; optimization facts support recommendation inputs without owning product price history.
6B product/customer price history uses the 6A effective-date pricing primitive without making the 6A table the 6B business anchor.
V11 pricing authority requires service-manifest traceability because the accepted structural add is a core pricing micro-service boundary inside the Product Pricing service.
Product price histories attach to product records; the 6B.02 source says pricing owns product prices/effective dates while consuming product.created from 6B.01.

parent_required_dependency_trace.reason: Product Pricing consumes product.created and must attach price history to the 6B.01 product authority.
6A platform pricing effective-date primitive supports effective-date ranges; v11 keeps it distinct from the 6B product price-history authority.
Optimization facts support source-grounded package suggestions and projections.
